extension.description: A beautiful markdown viewer + editor for VSCode — rich rendering, live mermaid, sortable tables, code-block exports, notes sidebar, and an MCP server for AI agents.
view.notes.name: Notes
view.backlinks.name: Backlinks
command.toggleMode: Mark It Down: Toggle View / Edit
command.openWithDefaultEditor: Mark It Down: Open with VSCode Default Editor
command.exportPdf: Mark It Down: Export to PDF
command.exportDocx: Mark It Down: Export to DOCX
command.exportTxt: Mark It Down: Export to TXT
command.exportEpub: Mark It Down: Export to ePub
command.exportCategoryEpub: Mark It Down: Export Category as ePub
command.mcp.install: Install MCP for Claude Desktop / Code
command.mcp.revealServer: Show MCP Server Path (copy to clipboard)
config.theme.description: Theme for the markdown renderer. 'auto' follows VSCode's active theme.
config.startMode.description: Default mode when opening a markdown file.
config.mermaid.enabled.description: Render mermaid code blocks as live diagrams.
config.notes.categories.description: Categories shown in the Notes sidebar.
config.notes.defaultCategory.description: Pre-selected category when creating a new note.
config.notes.defaultScope.description: Where new notes go by default.
config.warehouse.repo.description: GitHub repo to use as your notes warehouse, in `owner/repo` form. Leave empty to disable cloud sync.
config.warehouse.branch.description: Branch on the warehouse repo to sync against.
config.warehouse.subdir.description: Subdirectory inside the warehouse repo where notes are stored.
config.warehouse.transport.description: How to authenticate with GitHub for warehouse operations.
config.warehouse.autoPush.description: Push to the warehouse automatically after a note save (debounced).
config.warehouse.autoPushDebounceMs.desc: Debounce window for auto-push, in milliseconds.
config.warehouse.workspaceId.description: Override the workspace folder name used as a subfolder in the warehouse.
config.publish.enabled.description: Allow Publish commands to push a generated static site to the warehouse repo.
config.publish.branch.description: Branch on the warehouse repo to publish to.
config.publish.path.description: Subdirectory under the publish branch root where the site lives.
config.publish.includeGlob.description: Glob (relative to source) of files included in a full Deploy Site run.
config.publish.theme.description: Theme baked into the published site.
config.slideshow.theme.description: Reveal.js theme used by the slideshow preview and published slides.
config.slideshow.includeSpeakerNotes.des: Render lines after a `Notes:` block on each slide as Reveal speaker notes.
config.updates.checkOnLaunch.description: Check for newer Mark It Down releases on GitHub once per launch.
config.telemetry.enabled.description: Send anonymized error reports to help improve Mark It Down.
config.telemetry.dsn.description: Sentry DSN endpoint to receive telemetry events.
config.epub.author.description: Author name baked into ePub metadata.
config.epub.coverImage.description: Path to a PNG or JPEG used as the ePub cover.
viewsContainer.title: Mark It Down
view.welcome.notes:
No notes yet.
[New Note](command:markItDown.notes.create)

Notes are stored privately in VSCode's workspace or global storage.
